untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of gap formation and trend direction context, which cannot be expressed with available indicators and operators. Gap detection requires comparing open vs previous close across session boundaries. Trend classification (TRENDING_UP vs TRENDING_DOWN) is a regime determination, not a condition. Retracement level is AUTHOR_SILENT with no specific percentage defined.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using pivot support/resistance (s1/r1) as retracement targets and price movement reversal as gap proxy, but this does not accurately capture the intended gap-and-retracement logic. A proper implementation would require gap detection indicator and explicit trend regime filtering.
